name: MiNK Therapeutics Inc. Common Stock
summary: MiNK Therapeutics Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company pioneering the discovery, development, and commercialization of allogeneic, off-the-shelf, invariant natural killer T (iNKT) cell therapies to treat cancer and other immune-mediated diseases. They focus on harnessing the unique biology of iNKT cells to develop therapies that are both safe and effective. The company is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
